title: hieracium bauhini subsp. kerneri
intro: Hieracium bauhini subsp. kerneri is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Hieracium bauhini subsp. kerneri can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
